center.name: Serranía de las Quinchas
center.summary: Serranía de las Quinchas是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括藍嘴鳳冠雉，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its range used to stretch 106,700-square-kilometers; it now has a highly fragmented range, with small populations between La Guajira and Magdalena Departments south to Antioquia and Boyacá Departments with 2,090-square-kilometers. It inhabits undisturbed forest in the tropical and upper tropical zones, mostly from near sea level to but at least formerly as high as . The Serranía de las Quinchas area in the Magdalena Valley is home to the last viable population of blue-billed curassows
